seoTitle: How to Fix a Temporarily Locked PayPal Account (2026)
metaDescription: Find out how to resolve a temporary PayPal lock by checking security alerts, verifying your identity in the Resolution Center, and resetting credentials.
intro: A locked or limited PayPal account can freeze your ability to send or receive money right when you need it most. This guide walks through diagnosing why the lock happened and clearing it through PayPal's Resolution Center. It's written for anyone facing a sudden restriction due to suspicious activity or missing verification.

steps.heading: Check your notifications for the reason
steps.body: Log in and look at the notifications bell to see what specific alert triggered the account restriction.

steps.heading: Open the Resolution Center
steps.body: Go to Help, then Resolution Center, to view the exact checklist PayPal needs you to complete before lifting the limit.

steps.heading: Submit identity verification
steps.body: Use the secure upload area to submit a clear photo of your government-issued ID or passport as requested.

steps.heading: Confirm bank or card ownership
steps.body: If asked, provide a bank or card statement to confirm you own the linked funding source tied to your account.

steps.heading: Wait for review and monitor your inbox
steps.body: Submit your documents and keep an eye on your email for confirmation that your account access has been restored.

faq.question: How long does account restoration usually take?
faq.answer: Turnaround varies, but most reviews complete within a few business days once all requested documents are submitted.

faq.question: Why did my account get locked in the first place?
faq.answer: Common triggers include unusual login locations, sudden high-volume transactions, or missing regulatory information on file.

faq.question: Can I still contact support while locked out?
faq.answer: Yes, PayPal offers guest help lines for users who can't log in to their profile to start the recovery process.

faq.question: Will I lose my transaction history if my account is locked?
faq.answer: No, your history stays intact and becomes accessible again as soon as the restriction is lifted.
